div.head:
No. 663
Editorial Note
div.p: Upon the conclusion of the Nine-Power Conference at London on October 3, the Governments of the United States and France initiated efforts to implement the Final Act of the Nine-Power Conference, while the French Government also intensified its efforts in the negotiations with the Federal Republic of Germany concerning a Saar Agreement. For documentation on these subjects, including the meetings in Paris on October 20–23 during which the protocol which emanated from the Nine-Power and Four-Power conferences and the Saar Agreement were signed, see volume V, Part 2, pages 1294 ff.
